theory.canonical_statement: ID3502 records Gyromagnetic Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `D:\00_Engine\CSV\concept_clusters.csv` for registry alignment and later derivation.
